Drivers and functions for STM32 microcontrollers, including button, CRC, serial, GPIO, OTP, RTC, flash, and watchdog.


## Files
- **[button.c](button.c.md)**: Button driver implementation for STM32, including initialization and state checking functions.
- **[crc.c](crc.c.md)**: Implements CRC calculation functions for byte arrays and flash memory on STM32 microcontrollers.
- **[dbgserial.c](dbgserial.c.md)**: Serial communication driver for STM32, including initialization and data transmission functions.
- **[gpio.c](gpio.c.md)**: Manages GPIO clock usage and release for STM32 microcontrollers.
- **[otp.c](otp.c.md)**: Functions for accessing and checking lock status of OTP slots in STM32 microcontrollers.
- **[rtc.c](rtc.c.md)**: Real-time clock (RTC) driver for STM32 microcontrollers, including initialization and mode switching.
- **[system_flash.c](system_flash.c.md)**: Functions for erasing and writing to system flash memory on STM32 microcontrollers.
- **[watchdog.c](watchdog.c.md)**: Initializes and controls the watchdog timer for STM32F2xx microcontrollers.
